message:
feat(store,command): implement DUMP/RESTORE serialization with full type coverage

Replace DUMP/RESTORE stubs with working serialization/deserialization:

fr-store/src/lib.rs:
- Add Store::dump_key() method: serializes any key value to a portable
  binary format with type byte, variable-length encoded payloads, 8-byte
  LE TTL, version byte (10), and 2-byte CRC placeholder
- Supported types: String (0), List (1), Set (2), Hash (4), SortedSet (5),
  Stream (15, minimal stub)
- Add Store::restore_key() method: deserializes DUMP payload back into
  store entries with optional TTL and REPLACE flag support
- Add encode_length/decode_length helpers using varint scheme (1 byte
  for <128, 4 bytes with high-bit marker otherwise)
- Add StoreError::InvalidDumpPayload for corrupt/truncated payloads
- Add StoreError::BusyKey for RESTORE without REPLACE when key exists

fr-command/src/lib.rs:
- dump_cmd: now passes store and now_ms to actually serialize the key,
  returns BulkString(Some(payload)) on hit, BulkString(None) on miss
- restore_cmd: parses TTL from argv[2], payload from argv[3], scans
  argv[4..] for case-insensitive REPLACE flag, delegates to
  store.restore_key() with proper BUSYKEY/InvalidDumpPayload error
  responses
- Update dispatch_argv match arms to pass (store, now_ms) to both
  dump_cmd and restore_cmd

fr-runtime/src/lib.rs:
- Add CommandError -> RespFrame mappings for the two new StoreError
  variants (InvalidDumpPayload, BusyKey) in command_error_to_resp

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
